name: Shortsword
description: A light, finesse blade favored by rogues. Deals 1d6 piercing damage.

name: Longsword
description: A versatile martial weapon. Deals 1d8 slashing damage.

name: Shortbow
description: A simple ranged weapon with 80ft range. Deals 1d6 piercing damage.

name: Leather Armor
description: Light armor made of cured leather. AC 11 + DEX modifier.

name: Chain Shirt
description: Medium armor of interlocking metal rings. AC 13 + DEX modifier (max 2).

name: Healing Potion
description: A vial of glowing red liquid. Restores 2d4+2 HP when consumed.

name: Antidote
description: A bitter herbal remedy that cures poison and grants poison resistance for 1 hour.

name: Shadow Ward Potion
description: A shimmering silver liquid brewed by Greenleaf. Grants resistance to necrotic damage for 10 minutes.

name: Mine Key
description: A heavy iron key that opens the sealed gate to the mid-level Greyspine Mines.

name: Darian's Journal
description: The last pages of a dead mercenary's journal, containing sketches of strange symbols found deep in the mines.

name: Hempen Rope
description: 50 feet of sturdy rope. Useful for climbing, binding, or improvised traps.

name: Torch
description: A simple torch that burns for 1 hour, providing bright light in a 20ft radius.
